LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForSandstoneChunk.label: 挖掘以採集砂岩塊
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForGraniteChunk.label: 挖掘以採集花崗岩塊
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForLimestoneChunk.label: 挖掘以採集石灰岩塊
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForSlateChunk.label: 挖掘以採集板岩塊
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForMarbleChunk.label: 挖掘以採集大理石塊
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForRoseQuartzChunk.label: 挖掘以採集玫瑰石英塊
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForRoseQuartzChunk.descrip: 挖掘以採集玫瑰石英塊。
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForCragstoneChunk.label: 挖掘以採集峭壁岩塊
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForOnyxglassChunk.label: 挖掘以採集黑曜玻璃塊
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForOnyxglassChunk.descript: 挖掘以採集黑曜玻璃塊。
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForMudstoneChunk.label: 挖掘以採集泥岩塊
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForSlimeStoneChunk.label: 挖掘以採集硬化黏液塊
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForSlimeStoneChunk.descrip: 挖掘以採集硬化黏液塊。
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForMetals.label: 挖掘金屬
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForMetals.description: 挖掘隨機金屬。開採出的金屬類型取決於資源的深層分佈概率。數量則取決於該礦床的通常產量。
